title: Google Gemini Monthly Active Users Exceed 950 Million, Approaching ChatGPT's Billion-User Milestone
excerpt: Alphabet, Google's parent company, revealed during its Q2 2026 earnings call that the monthly active users of its AI assistant Gemini have exceeded 950 million.
content_html:
Alphabet, Google's parent company, revealed during its Q2 2026 earnings call that the monthly active users of its AI assistant Gemini have exceeded 950 million., which is set to join the super-product group with over a billion users, consisting of search, Gmail, Drive, Android, YouTube, and Chrome. Data shows that Gemini's user base has doubled compared to last year (daily active users have tripled), significantly increasing from the previously reported 750 million monthly active users in February 2026, further narrowing the gap with ChatGPT, which reached a billion monthly active users in June.

This explosive growth is attributed to deep integration within the ecosystem and rapid functional iteration. In addition to the Android ecosystem, Gemini performed impressively on the iOS platform, with over 137 million downloads in the past 12 months. New features such as the Nano Banana image generation model and the Gemini Spark personalized assistant have significantly increased user engagement. According to the latest report from Sensor Tower on the first half of 2026, ChatGPT's market share in the AI assistant sector has fallen below 50% for the first time, while Gemini has risen to 27.7%.

While driving the rapid growth of Gemini, Google's search business, which has been AI-enhanced, also saw its question-and-answer AI mode user base exceed 1 billion this quarter, driving a steady increase in search queries. In response to the cost pressure brought by large-scale reasoning, Google stated that it has successfully reduced the operational costs of the AI mode through hardware engineering methods. Facing the trend of AI assistants replacing traditional search, Google continues to solidify its leading position in the consumer-level AI race by leveraging its vast distribution engine and underlying computing power optimization.

sentences.en: Alphabet, Google's parent company, revealed during its Q2 2026 earnings call that the monthly active users of its AI assistant Gemini have exceeded 950 million., which is set to join the super-product group with over a billion users, consisting of search, Gmail, Drive, Android, YouTube, and Chrome.
sentences.zh: 谷歌母公司Alphabet在2026年第二季度财报电话会议上透露，其人工智能助手Gemini的月活跃用户已超过9.5亿，将加入由搜索、Gmail、Drive、Android、YouTube和Chrome组成的拥有超过10亿用户的超级产品群。

sentences.en: Data shows that Gemini's user base has doubled compared to last year (daily active users have tripled), significantly increasing from the previously reported 750 million monthly active users in February 2026, further narrowing the gap with ChatGPT, which reached a billion monthly active users in June.

In addition to the Android ecosystem, Gemini performed impressively on the iOS platform, with over 137 million downloads in the past 12 months. New features such as the Nano Banana image generation model and the Gemini Spark personalized assistant have significantly increased user engagement. According to the latest report from Sensor Tower on the first half of 2026, ChatGPT's market share in the AI assistant sector has fallen below 50% for the first time, while Gemini has risen to 27.7%.

sentences.en: This explosive growth is attributed to deep integration within the ecosystem and rapid functional iteration.
sentences.zh: 这种爆炸性增长归功于生态系统的深度整合和快速的功能迭代。

sentences.en: In addition to the Android ecosystem, Gemini performed impressively on the iOS platform, with over 137 million downloads in the past 12 months.
sentences.zh: 除了Android生态系统外，Gemini在iOS平台上也表现出色，过去12个月下载量超过1.37亿次。

sentences.en: New features such as the Nano Banana image generation model and the Gemini Spark personalized assistant have significantly increased user engagement.
sentences.zh: Nano Banana图像生成模型和Gemini Spark个性化助手等新功能显着提高了用户参与度。

sentences.en: According to the latest report from Sensor Tower on the first half of 2026, ChatGPT's market share in the AI assistant sector has fallen below 50% for the first time, while Gemini has risen to 27.7%.
sentences.zh: 据Sensor Tower 2026年上半年最新报告显示，ChatGPT在AI助手领域的市场份额首次跌破50%，而Gemini则上升至27.7%。

blocks.html_en: While driving the rapid growth of Gemini, Google's search business, which has been AI-enhanced, also saw its question-and-answer AI mode user base exceed 1 billion this quarter, driving a steady increase in search queries. In response to the cost pressure brought by large-scale reasoning, Google stated that it has successfully reduced the operational costs of the AI mode through hardware engineering methods. Facing the trend of AI assistants replacing traditional search, Google continues to solidify its leading position in the consumer-level AI race by leveraging its vast distribution engine and underlying computing power optimization.

sentences.en: While driving the rapid growth of Gemini, Google's search business, which has been AI-enhanced, also saw its question-and-answer AI mode user base exceed 1 billion this quarter, driving a steady increase in search queries.
sentences.zh: 在带动Gemini快速增长的同时，经过AI增强的谷歌搜索业务本季度问答AI模式用户数也突破10亿，带动搜索查询量稳步增长。

sentences.en: In response to the cost pressure brought by large-scale reasoning, Google stated that it has successfully reduced the operational costs of the AI mode through hardware engineering methods.
sentences.zh: 针对大规模推理带来的成本压力，谷歌表示已通过硬件工程方法成功降低了AI模式的运营成本。

sentences.en: Facing the trend of AI assistants replacing traditional search, Google continues to solidify its leading position in the consumer-level AI race by leveraging its vast distribution engine and underlying computing power optimization.
sentences.zh: 面对AI助手取代传统搜索的趋势，谷歌凭借庞大的分发引擎和底层算力优化，继续巩固其在消费级AI竞赛中的领先地位。

content_html_zh:
谷歌母公司Alphabet在2026年第二季度财报电话会议上透露，其人工智能助手Gemini的月活跃用户已超过9.5亿，将加入由搜索、Gmail、Drive、Android、YouTube和Chrome组成的拥有超过10亿用户的超级产品群。 数据显示，Gemini 的用户基数较去年增长了一倍（日活跃用户增长了两倍），较之前报道的 2026 年 2 月月活跃用户数 7.5 亿大幅增长，进一步缩小了与 6 月份月活跃用户达到 10 亿的 ChatGPT 的差距。

这种爆炸性增长归功于生态系统的深度整合和快速的功能迭代。 除了Android生态系统外，Gemini在iOS平台上也表现出色，过去12个月下载量超过1.37亿次。 Nano Banana图像生成模型和Gemini Spark个性化助手等新功能显着提高了用户参与度。 据Sensor Tower 2026年上半年最新报告显示，ChatGPT在AI助手领域的市场份额首次跌破50%，而Gemini则上升至27.7%。

在带动Gemini快速增长的同时，经过AI增强的谷歌搜索业务本季度问答AI模式用户数也突破10亿，带动搜索查询量稳步增长。 针对大规模推理带来的成本压力，谷歌表示已通过硬件工程方法成功降低了AI模式的运营成本。 面对AI助手取代传统搜索的趋势，谷歌凭借庞大的分发引擎和底层算力优化，继续巩固其在消费级AI竞赛中的领先地位。
